name: Git-Claw
desc: Cocapn git-agent TUI — commands its own build, talks to Copilot/extensions

equipment.name: Keeper Memory
equipment.desc: Persistent JSONL memory with keyword search and tagging

equipment.name: Plan Mode
equipment.desc: Write-blocked analysis mode — agent writes to plan file only

equipment.name: MCP Bridge
equipment.desc: Connect to any MCP server (Copilot, linters, custom tools)

equipment.name: Git Integration
equipment.desc: status, diff, log, branch from slash commands

equipment.name: Permission Gate
equipment.desc: Captain auto-approves reads, Admiral approves writes

equipment.name: Context Compaction
equipment.desc: Auto-summarize when approaching token window limit
